title: asplenium fontanum subsp. pseudofontanum
intro: Asplenium fontanum subsp. pseudofontanum is a subspecies of the Asplenium fontanum fern, specifically a type of spleenwort native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Asplenium fontanum subsp. pseudofontanum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the respiratory system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
